positive: Minimalist geometric forest scene, featuring stylized silhouettes of diverse woodland elements like birch trees, deer, foxes, and ferns, arranged symmetrically in a central, harmonious composition. Use a limited palette of deep emerald green, slate blue, and creamy off-white. High contrast, crisp lines, flat vector-art aesthetic inspired by nature-inspired Scandinavian print design. Excellent for screen printing on apparel. Clean negative space is crucial. Golden hour backlighting casting dramatic, simplified shadows. Highly detailed, high resolution, symmetrical arrangement.
